summary: Iteration 184 testing complete: L² Fractal Engine (54 sub-layers) and Mastery Avenues (3 paths). All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed missing Grid3X3 import in MasteryAvenues.js. All frontend UI elements verified with correct data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: sublayers.py correctly implements L² fractal grid: Crust=2²=4, Mantle=3²=9, Core=4²=16, Hollow=5²=25, Total=54
Local Density Rendering works: only current depth returns sublayers array, others return null
Sub-layer navigation costs dust on FIRST visit only, subsequent visits are free
avenues.py implements 3 Mastery Avenues: Mathematics (8 challenges), Art (5 prompts), Thought (6 quests)
Resonance thresholds gate Shadow Sprite collapse: common=0, uncommon=30, rare=100, legendary=300
master_view.py includes fractal_engine, mastery_avenues, and taste_test sections
taste_test validates: geometric_integrity (L² verified), quantum_handshake (resonance thresholds), dimensional_flow (54 layers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 184 L² Fractal Engine and Mastery Avenues all working. Test user has: consciousness_level=1, explored 2/54 sublayers (crust_sub_0, crust_sub_1). At level 1, only Crust (4 sub-layers) is accessible. Mantle requires level 2, Core requires level 3, Hollow requires level 4. Math challenges have known answers: phi_ratio=1.618, platonic_count=5, fibonacci_8th=21, pi_sequence=14159, euler_identity=1. User has solved phi_ratio and platonic_count. Current resonance: math=27, art=12, thought=15, total=54. Fixed missing Grid3X3 import in MasteryAvenues.js.

backend_apis.GET /api/sublayers/fractal-map: Returns 4 depths with L² sub-layers, total=54, exploration progress
backend_apis.GET /api/sublayers/depth/{depth_id}: Unfolds specific depth's fractal grid (gated by consciousness level)
backend_apis.POST /api/sublayers/navigate: Navigate to sub-layer (costs dust on first visit, grants XP)
backend_apis.GET /api/sublayers/progress: Detailed exploration progress across all 54 sub-layers
backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/overview: Returns 3 avenues with resonance, tier, completion
backend_apis.POST /api/avenues/mathematics/solve: Solve challenge with correct answer gives resonance+XP
backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/resonance-check: Returns combined resonance with collapse thresholds
backend_apis.GET /api/master-view/audit: Includes fractal_engine, mastery_avenues, and taste_test sections

frontend_pages.sublayer_cells: 4 cells in crust grid with data-testid='sublayer-{id}'

bug_fixed.issue: MasteryAvenues.js crashed with 'ReferenceError: Grid3X3 is not defined'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Grid3X3 icon was used on line 411 but not imported from lucide-react
bug_fixed.fix: Added Grid3X3 to the import statement from lucide-react
